creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
SATA DVD-RW attached to Intel Q35 based motherboard is not able to write/blank CDs and freezes the whole system (needs hard reset), it was in old ATA mode, in AHCI mode I am not even able to burn anything (but someone already mentioned to check STABLE to that).

How-To-Repeat: # burncd data image.iso fixate
